message:
test(core): add property-based tests for deterministic trace v2

23 proptests covering TraceFormatVersion/CanonicalOrdering serde,
fingerprint determinism, seq monotonicity, trace serde, digest
determinism, canonicalize idempotency/count preservation/max_entries/
strip_timestamps/dedup, self-comparison identity, filter_by_domain,
causal_chain, domain_histogram sum, merge count/seq, time_window
range, verify_determinism, plus serde for comparison/degradation/
snapshot types and reset. (ft-2p9cb.5.3.3)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
